description: Speechify provides AI voice products including text-to-speech, voice cloning, and realtime voice agents. Its platform lets developers generate speech, manage voices, and build conversational voice experiences.
summary: Speechify exposes one authenticated REST API at https://api.speechify.ai for TTS, voices, and agents, plus two public MCP servers: the cataloged Speechify MCP endpoint and a docs-search MCP server.
